title: Zovark — Tool Execution
description: Ticket 7 — tool.* spans latency and errors; aligns with worker metrics zovark.worker.tool.*

panels.title: Tool span p95 by tool name
panels.query: SELECT name, quantile(0.95)(durationNano)/1e9 AS p95_s, count() AS n FROM signoz_index_v2 WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND name LIKE 'tool.%' GROUP BY name ORDER BY p95_s DESC LIMIT 25

panels.title: Tool error rate
panels.query: SELECT name, countIf(statusCode = 2) AS errs, count() AS total FROM signoz_index_v2 WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND name LIKE 'tool.%' GROUP BY name

panels.title: OTel metric: zovark.worker.tool.executions (Metrics explorer)
panels.query: Use SigNoz Metrics tab for zovark.worker.tool.executions and zovark.worker.tool.duration_seconds with group by tool / error
